allow: Bash(wsl -e bash -lc "cd /tmp/deneb-src && which pnpm && pnpm build 2>&1 | tail -40")
Bash(wsl -e bash -lc "which node; which pnpm; echo PATH=$PATH")
Bash(wsl -u choiceoh -e bash -lc "which pnpm; which node; cd /tmp/deneb-src && pnpm build 2>&1 | tail -40")

Bash(wsl -u choiceoh -e bash -lc "cat ~/.bashrc | grep -i ''pnpm\\|nvm\\|fnm\\|node\\|PATH'' | head -20; ls ~/. -la | grep -i nvm; ls /home/choiceoh/.local/share/pnpm 2>/dev/null; ls /home/choiceoh/.nvm 2>/dev/null")

Bash(wsl -u choiceoh -e bash -lc "find /home/choiceoh -maxdepth 3 -name ''pnpm'' -o -name ''node'' 2>/dev/null | head -10; ls /home/choiceoh/.local/share/pnpm/pnpm 2>/dev/null; corepack enable 2>/dev/null && which pnpm 2>/dev/null")
